solid_tumor_rules.title: Solid Tumor Rules (Combined) [fixture]
solid_tumor_rules.effective_note: Site-group sections carry their own effective date ranges via applies_to; the breast section applies to cases diagnosed 2018-01-01 forward.

spcsm_2024.title: SEER Program Coding and Staging Manual 2024 [fixture]

store_2024.title: STORE: Standards for Oncology Registry Entry 2024 [fixture]
store_2024.effective_note: Supersedes FORDS within the CoC family for cases diagnosed on or after the publication date.

fords_2016.title: FORDS: Facility Oncology Registry Data Standards 2016 [fixture]
fords_2016.effective_note: Superseded by STORE for cases diagnosed on or after 2023-10-01; remains the applicable CoC manual for earlier diagnoses.
